title: Sweet French Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful vegan tagine dish made with sweet ingredients. Enjoy as a hearty dessert.

ingredients.name: Tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at Middle Eastern or North African markets

ingredients.name: Coconut sugar
ingredients.notes: Or substitute with date syrup for a more intense flavor

instructions: Grease an 8x8 inch baking dish with coconut oil.
In a blender, combine sweet potatoes, chocolate, dates, and tagine spice blend.
Blend until smooth and creamy, stopping to scrape down the sides as needed.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
If using almond milk, drizzle it over the top of the mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center is slightly gooey.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional chocolate shavings or chopped nuts, if desired.
